'''Mellichae''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] who had a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] arm wearing [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] armor and led the [[Sith Shadows]] on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Mellichae and his minions continuously attacked the village of [[Aurilia]], trying to kill or capture the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] residents to gain the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor's]] favor. He was defeated by a Force-sensitive individual who was sent by the [[Old Man]] and imprisoned inside the village.

[[File:Mellichae.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Mellichae, imprisoned at the Aurillia township.]]
Sometime later, Aurilia was attacked by stormtroopers and Mellichae made his escape. Two days after, a Rebel agent visited the village, looking for a fragment of the [[Codex of Tython]], kept by Mellichae. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sarguillo]] explained the agent where to find the Dark Jedi. Although the agent was attacked by both Mellichae and the [[Sith Shadows]], he was able to defeat them and recover the piece of [[Holocron/Legends|Holocron]] from the Zabrak. Afterwards, Mellichae was once again returned to custody in Aurilia.<ref>{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Light Side scenario campaign}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', prior to the introduction of the ''New Game Enhancements'' of [[2005]], Mellichae ordered his Sith Shadows to constantly attack the village of Aurilia, [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. Force-sensitive players of the game were required to locate and kill Mellichae, in order to proceed with the ''Padawan Trials''.

Mellichae was removed from the game, along with Aurilia, when the ''New Game Enhancements'' of 2005 were implemented. He made a return to the game, appearing in the Aurilia jail when Aurilia was reintroduced as part of Chapter 7 in November [[2007]]. Star Wars Galaxies was later shut down on [[December 15]], 2011.
